summary: Full testing of Arbitrage Portefeuille module (backend + frontend). All 21 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified including scoring table, envelopes with OPEX red alert, simulator with sandbox dirty state and impact panel, weights modal with W1-W6 inputs.
critical_code_review_comments: service.py is clean - async, proper MongoDB exclusion of _id, good error handling
Score formula correctly implements W1×align + W2×bv + W3×roi + W4×urg − W5×risk − W6×comp with normalization 0-100
Frontend Arbitrage.jsx is 1060 lines - near the 700-line threshold but functional
seed_data_creation: None - existing seed data used (8 projects with scoring values + 2026 envelope)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Arbitrage module fully tested and working. Backend: 8 projects with correct scores (CRM Salesforce top at 78.8, Portail RH bottom at 33.8), 2026 envelope (CAPEX=12M, OPEX=6M), weights W1-W6 all at defaults. Frontend: all 3 tabs working - scoring table with inline editing, envelopes with CAPEX green/OPEX red alert, simulator with sandbox dirty/impact panel. Weights modal accessible for admin.

verified_features.GET /api/arbitrage/summary: PASS - 8 projects, sorted by score desc, CRM top at 78.8
verified_features.PATCH /api/arbitrage/projects/{id}/scori: PASS - updates field and returns new score
verified_features.KPI cards: PASS - 8 projets, score moyen 61, CAPEX 5 675 000€, OPEX 11 375 000€
verified_features.OPEX over-budget red alert: PASS - red progress bar + Dépassement badge (190%)
verified_features.Sandbox dirty amber highlight: PASS - * indicator and impact panel appear
verified_features.Weights modal admin: PASS - opens with W1-W6 inputs at correct defaults
verified_features.Bubble chart: PASS - renders with colored RAG dots
